headline: Harvard endowment chief N.P. Narvekar plans retirement after decade-long tenure
summary: Investing.com -- N.P. “Narv” Narvekar, the chief executive officer of Harvard University’s $56.9 billion endowment, has notified the board of his plans to retire after nearly a decade in the role, according to an exclusive Wall Street Journal report citing people familiar with the matter.

content.title: Harvard endowment chief N.P. Narvekar plans retirement after decade-long tenure

headline: Does Blackstone’s New BXDC Data Center REIT Meaningfully Change The Bull Case For Blackstone (BX)?
summary: Earlier this week, Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust (BXDC) completed its US$1.75 billion initial public offering at US$20 per share for 87.5 million shares, beginning trading on the NYSE with a mandate to invest in newly built, income-generating data centers leased to investment-grade hyperscale tenants. This new data center REIT reinforces Blackstone’s push into digital infrastructure, aligning its alternative-asset platform with rising enterprise demand for cloud and AI-ready...
